domain: submarine passive sonar triangulation (multiple spatially-separated hydrophone arrays each providing a bearing on acoustic source; cross-array triangulation gives range without active emission; Wide-Aperture Array uses time-difference-of-arrival; LOFAR narrowband classifies source spectral signature)
specific_mechanism: Each hydrophone array (bow, hull, towed, flank) gives a relative-amplitude pattern across its elements → a BEARING (direction-of-arrival) to any sound source. Two or more arrays' bearings intersect to TRIANGULATE position. Wide-Aperture Array uses time-difference-of-arrival across hull-spread elements for additional ranging. LOFAR (Low-Frequency Analysis Recording) provides narrowband classification of source by spectral fingerprint (engine/propeller harmonics).
llm_application: Cross-layer attention-head triangulation for output-provenance attribution: each layer's set of attention heads = a hydrophone array; for any output token, the relative-amplitude profile of attention across heads gives a 'bearing' = which context position dominantly drove this output at this layer. K layers = K spatially-separated arrays. Triangulate by intersecting K layer-bearings in context-position space to localize the SOURCE TOKEN(S). Narrowband role-classification: spectral fingerprint of attention-matrix eigenvalues classifies source-token role (entity / refusal-cue / quoted-fact / connective). Whole pipeline is PASSIVE (no retraining or active probing). Use case: token-level provenance for content moderation + factuality auditing.
novelty_claim: Multi-head attention literature (TransMLA 2502.07864, MEA 2601.19611, TensorLLM 2501.15674) focuses on architecture; does not propose cross-LAYER triangulation. Attention attribution work (integrated gradients, attention rollout) computes per-head importance but not multi-layer bearing intersection. Language Attention Heads (2511.07498) identifies specialized heads but does not triangulate. The submarine sonar framing (passive, multi-array, narrowband-classified, bearing-intersected) is not in surveyed prior art as a single provenance mechanism.
